name: dscraft
summary: DSCraft: a unified, MIT-licensed, local-first ML tooling platform -- tabular AutoML, data cleaning, time-series forecasting, graph ML, computer vision, LLM fine-tuning, LLM/agent red-teaming, and agent/RAG benchmark eval, all as installable extras of one package. `core` is the thin shared substrate (data-tier conventions, OTel GenAI telemetry helpers, license-isolation policy, shared sandbox executor) used by every other dscraft subpackage.
author: DSCraft
